additional-properties.notes: Draft submission data extracted from the completed 2023/1428 application form for Full Planning Permission, with visible Camden public register details and document list used for planning authority reference and document provenance. The data has been mapped as far as possible to the 2026 submission data standard. Contact details and one owner or tenant name are redacted in the source and are left blank in the public submission JSON. Some Greater London-specific Planning Portal answers do not currently have a direct module in the core submission structure, so they are recorded in the private extraction report rather than added to the payload.
